spec.description:
Displays total CPU usage for the Proxmox node, calculated as 100% minus average idle time across all CPU cores.
Data is scraped via node_exporter and shown as a 1-minute rate.
spec.title: CPU (%)

spec.description:
The percentage of CPU capacity used by each virtual machine (QEMU) and container (LXC) on the Proxmox node. 

CPU usage is shown relative to each guest’s allocated CPU quota.
spec.title: CPU per VM/LXC

spec.description:
Memory usage per guest in percent. It calculates the ratio of pve_memory_usage_bytes to pve_memory_size_bytes. 

Identify memory-heavy workloads and monitor for over- or under-provisioned guests.
spec.title: Memory per VM/LXC

spec.expr: sum by (id) (pve_up{hostname="proxmox"} and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info)
sum by (id) (pve_cpu_usage_limit{hostname="proxmox"} and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info)
sum by (id) (pve_memory_size_bytes{hostname="proxmox"} and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info)
sum by (id) (pve_memory_usage_bytes{hostname="proxmox",template!="1"} / pve_memory_size_bytes and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info and on (id) pve_up==1)
sum by (id) (pve_disk_size_bytes{hostname="proxmox"} and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info)
sum by (id) (pve_disk_usage_bytes{hostname="proxmox"} / pve_disk_size_bytes and on (id, instance) pve_guest_info{type="lxc"})

(
    rate(
        pve_network_receive_bytes{hostname="proxmox"}[5m]
        ) 
    * 
    on(id, instance) 
    group_left(name, type) 
    pve_guest_info
) 
and 
on(id, instance) 
pve_up == 1

(
    rate(
        pve_network_transmit_bytes{hostname="proxmox"}[5m]
        )
    * 
    on(id, instance) 
    group_left(name, type) 
    pve_guest_info
    # pve_guest_info{hostname="proxmox", name=~"$hostname"}
) and 
on(id, instance) 
pve_up == 1

spec.description: Shows the amount of physical RAM currently in use on the Proxmox host, calculated as total memory minus available memory.
spec.title: Memory

spec.description:
CPU usage of each running Docker container across all monitored nodes.

CPU usage is measured as a percentage of a single core (100% = 1 core fully used).
spec.title: CPU per Container
Memory per container (% of host used)

spec.description:
Shows the real-time and historical power state of each disk.
Standby = 0, Active/Idle = 1, Unknown = -1, Error = -2.
Useful for verifying spin-down behavior, monitoring disk usage patterns, and optimizing power consumption in NAS systems.
spec.title: HDD State

spec.description: Displays real-time RPM values for critical system fans reported via IPMI, including the CPU fan (CPU0_FAN) and system fans (SYS_FAN1, SYS_FAN3). This chart helps monitor cooling performance and detect potential fan failures or irregularities. Values are collected using ipmi_exporter at 15-second intervals.
spec.title: Fan Speeds

spec.description: Component temperatures collected via IPMI and smartctl, including CPU, memory, HDDs and chipset elements.
spec.title: Temperatures
